visual: Pivots the body, deflects with a backfist, parries with an open hand, then steps into a bow stance delivering a straight fist punch at mid-level.
motion_description: The weight shifts to the back leg as the torso rotates approximately 180 degrees to the right, pivoting on the front heel while the arms sweep downward and across the body. Stepping onto the left heel, the right arm arcs upward into a backfist, followed by the left hand circling out to parry forward as the right fist chambers at the right hip. In a smooth, continuous sequence, the weight shifts completely forward into a left bow stance while the right fist drives a straight thrust at mid-chest level.
